title: Outpost Meadow Picnic Area | Presidio Tunnel Tops | The Presidio (San Francisco)
content: image of outpost meadow picnic area with the golden gate bridge in the background"). # Outpost Meadow Picnic Area. Enjoy a picnic with the family next to the Outpost nature playground. We’re giving visitors more to love at Presidio Tunnel Tops with the new Outpost Meadow picnic area. Created as an extension of the Presidio Tunnel Tops Outpost nature playground and Field Station, Outpost Meadow provides space to gather, rest, and enjoy a meal. The 1.5-acre site includes wheelchair accessible picnic tables, barbeque grills, stroller and bike parking, water fountains, a large lawn surrounded by gardens, and easy access to Presidio Pop Up food trucks. More than half the picnic tables at Outpost Meadow are accessible with companion seating. More reservable tables are located nearby at Picnic Place at Presidio Tunnel Tops. Woman, girl, and dog sitting on a picnic bench at Outpost Meadow, with Golden Gate Bridge background. Are dogs allowed at Outpost Meadow Picnic Pods?
